selection.status_reason: Live thesis monitor refreshed the active weekly pick.

reasons: Price trend remains constructive: 5-day momentum is 12.7% and 20-day momentum is 25.5%.
Trend quality is supported by 70% positive sessions over the last 10 trading days and the price sitting 13.1% relative to its 20-day average.
Risk profile shows daily volatility around 2.5%, downside volatility near 1.8%, and a recent max drawdown of 6.9%.
Volume confirmation is -29.5% versus the trailing baseline, which helps separate steady breakouts from thin momentum.
Relative strength is 9.3% versus SPY over 5 days and 11.1% versus the sector ETF.
News signal is bullish with score 0.87, confidence 0.83, and 0.6 weighted articles across 2 sources.
GPT-5 article classification and company-news provider coverage rated the news flow bullish at 0.87, after adjusting for relevance, recency, source quality, and story concentration.
Evidence quality: 2 articles across 2 sources, 0.6 effective weighted articles, average relevance 0.82, average source quality 0.78, confidence 0.83.
Technical weights were calibrated on 2303 historical symbol-weeks against 5-day excess return (IC -0.02).
Overall model score is 0.261 with high confidence.

news_evidence.title: Tesla: Buying at these levels means you get Optimus for 'free', Piper Sandler says
news_evidence.llm_reason: Summarizes a Piper Sandler analyst view framing current price as attractive due to valuation of the Optimus unit. Analyst commentary can influence near-term flows and sentiment, but is not a hard catalyst (no new earnings, guidance, or regulatory event). Expect modest, sentiment-driven impact if picked up broadly.
